,17],[I;-21,19,18,-19,20,19],[I;-21,9,18,-12,10,19],[I;-20,4,18,-18,7,19],[I;-21,5,18,-20,7,19],[I;-3,30,18,0,31,19],[I;-12,31,18,-6,32,19],[I;-3,25,18,0,26,19],[I;-13,26,18,-8,27,19],[I;-6,28,18,-2,29,19],[I;-20,28,18,-9,29,19],[I;-9,27,18,-1,28,19],[I;-8,18,18,-6,19,19],[I;-10,17,18,-9,18,19],[I;-11,19,18,-9,20,19],[I;-4,12,18,0,13,19],[I;-15,12,18,-14,13,19],[I;-21,13,18,-11,14,19],[I;-7,11,18,-6,12,19],[I;-11,10,18,-7,11,19],[I;-17,3,18,-13,4,19],[I;-18,5,18,-16,6,19],[I;-18,6,18,-14,7,19],[I;-12,3,18,0,4,19],[I;-17,19,18,-16,20,19],[I;-22,25,18,-15,26,19],[I;-6,17,18,-4,19,19],[I;-4,18,18,-2,19,19],[I;-2,19,18,0,20,19],[I;-3,6,18,0,7,19],[I;-6,5,18,-5,6,19],[I;-9,5,18,-8,6,19],[I;-13,4,18,-9,5,19],[I;-10,20,18,-5,21,19],[I;-1,17,18,0,18,19],[I;-21,19,16,-19,20,17],[I;-21,9,16,-12,10,17],[I;-20,4,16,-18,7,17],[I;-21,5,16,-20,7,17],[I;-3,30,16,0,31,17],[I;-12,31,16,-6,32,17],[I;-3,25,16,0,26,17],[I;-13,26,16,-8,27,17],[I;-6,28,16,-2,29,17],[I;-20,28,16,-9,29,17],[I;-9,27,16,-1,28,17],[I;-8,18,16,-6,19,17],[I;-10,17,16,-9,18,17],[I;-11,19,16,-9,20,17],[I;-4,12,16,0,13,17],[I;-15,12,16,-14,13,17],[I;-21,13,16,-11,14,17],[I;-7,11,16,-6,12,17],[I;-11,10,16,-7,11,17],[I;-17,3,16,-13,4,17],[I;-18,5,16,-16,6,17],[I;-18,6,16,-14,7,17],[I;-12,3,16,0,4,17],[I;-17,19,16,-16,20,17],[I;-22,25,16,-15,26,17],[I;-6,17,16,-4,19,17],[I;-4,18,16,-2,19,17],[I;-2,19,16,0,20,17],[I;-3,6,16,0,7,17],[I;-6,5,16,-5,6,17],[I;-9,5,16,-8,6,17],[I;-13,4,16,-9,5,17],[I;-10,20,16,-5,21,17],[I;-1,17,16,0,18,17],[I;15,52,18,16,54,19],[I;15,61,18,16,64,19],[I;12,58,18,13,61,19],[I;7,36,18,9,37,19],[I;1,36,18,3,37,19],[I;10,39,18,14,40,19],[I;12,33,18,15,34,19],[I;12,48,18,13,53,19],[I;14,47,18,15,50,19],[I;14,52,18,15,53,19],[I;13,44,18,14,48,19],[I;13,51,18,14,53,19],[I;13,62,18,14,63,19],[I;14,58,18,15,61,19],[I;13,37,18,14,38,19],[I;2,38,18,10,39,19],[I;13,32,18,15,33,19],[I;8,32,18,10,33,19],[I;0,33,18,3,34,19],[I;5,34,18,8,35,19],[I;15,52,16,16,54,17],[I;15,61,16,16,64,17],[I;12,58,16,13,61,1
